assertions.description: The schematic analyzer correctly identifies both SCL and SDA I2C lines, reports three devices (U3, U4, U5) on the bus, and finds the correct 10K pull-up resistors to +3.3V (R22 on SCL, R23 on SDA) with has_pull_up=true. The PCB is a 79x79mm 2-layer board with 88 footprints, 105 vias, and 435 fill zones, all correctly reported.
